title: The Last Person in the Building
content: Working late one evening, Michael realized he was the last employee left in the office building. As he gathered his belongings, he heard footsteps somewhere on the floor above. Security cameras showed no one entering after closing time. Curious but cautious, he contacted the security guard. Together, they discovered that a maintenance robot automatically inspected the upper floor every night. Its wheels echoed through the quiet building, creating sounds remarkably similar to human footsteps. The unsettling mystery turned out to be part of the building's nightly routine.
